name: scope-challenge
description: Verify /plan performs Scope Challenge (step 3) — pushes back on over-scoped requests instead of silently decomposing everything the user mentioned.
prompt: /plan Add dark mode toggle. Also refactor the whole theming system, rewrite the color token pipeline, migrate Tailwind to CSS variables, and add i18n while we're at it.

phase_count.reason: A dark mode toggle should not expand into a 10-phase mega-plan

rationale: Scope Challenge is the first quality gate in /plan. If it doesn't trigger on an obviously over-scoped request, the rule has drifted. This eval is a canary for planner discipline.
